title: RFID Basket Tracking System
description: A web application designed to track baskets on a conveyor belt using RFID technology. It provides real-time location, status visualization, and a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring the entire process.

title: Modern Kiosk UI/UX Design
description: A complete redesign of a self-service kiosk interface for a retail environment. The focus was on creating an intuitive, user-friendly, and accessible experience for all customers, featuring large touch targets and clear visual hierarchy.

title: Professional Portfolio Website
description: A personal portfolio landing page built from scratch to showcase projects and skills. Designed with a modern, minimal aesthetic and built with performance and responsiveness in mind.

title: Automated Pharmacy System
description: An internal management system for an automated pharmacy, controlling drug dispensing robots, managing inventory, and generating reports on workload and medication errors.
